title: Parvisedum leiocarpum

The classification of Parvisedum leiocarpum is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Order: Caryophyllales, Family: Cactaceae, Genus: Parvisedum.
